ddls:
CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each ticket (e.g., #508) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the ticket */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the ticket */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigned to the ticket */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket type (e.g., defect, enhancement) */,
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket priority level */,
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket resolution status */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was created */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the ticket belongs to */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ticket status */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the ticket was last updated */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the ticket should be resolved */,
  "estimated_hours" REAL /* Estimated number of hours required to resolve the ticket */,
  "actual_hours" REAL /* Actual number of hours spent on resolving the ticket */,
  "parent_ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the parent ticket (for parent-child relationships) */,
  "dependency_ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the dependent ticket (for dependency relationships) */,
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* ID of the milestone the ticket is linked to */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of tags for easy filtering and categorization */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the ticket is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_resolution_id FOREIGN KEY ("resolution_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_parent_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES resolutions ("resolution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_dependency_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("dependency_ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_milestone_id FOREIGN KEY ("milestone_id") REFERENCES milestones ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES ticket_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_priority_id FOREIGN KEY ("priority_id") REFERENCES priorities ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role (e.g., developer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date the user last logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the ticket type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ticket type */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the ticket type is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "priorities" (
  "priority_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each priority level */,
  "priority_name" TEXT /* Name of the priority level */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the priority level */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the priority level is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("priority_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each resolution status */,
  "resolution_name" TEXT /* Name of the resolution status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the resolution status */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the resolution status is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, on hold) */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the project is archived */,
  "client_id" INTEGER /* ID of the client the project is for */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_project_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projects_client_id FOREIGN KEY ("client_id") REFERENCES clients ("client_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the comment is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the comment is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_comments_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ticket_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each history entry */,
  "ticket_id" TEXT /* ID of the ticket the history entry is associated with */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., status, priority) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "is_archived" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the history entry is archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ticket_history_ticket_id FOREIGN KEY ("ticket_id") REFERENCES tickets ("ticket_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "milestones" (
  "milestone_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each milestone */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the milestone belongs to */,
  "milestone_name" TEXT /* Name of the milestone */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Date by which the milestone should be completed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the milestone (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the milestone */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the milestone was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the milestone was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("milestone_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_milestones_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Comma-separated list of permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_date" TEXT /* Date the role was assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clients" (
  "client_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each client */,
  "client_name" TEXT /* Name of the client */,
  "contact_person" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the client's organization */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact person */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the client */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the client record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the client record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("client_id")
)
